Copy Trades

Why Choose Us

EARN BY COPYING THE SUCCESS OF PRO TRADERS

Our Copytrading offers an opportunity to automatically copy leading traders and forget about long hours of building your own trading strategy. Choose from the best Masters of Forex and diversify your trading portfolio.

Create an account and make a deposit

Sign up in one easy step and make a deposit to your Wallet

Follow the best traders

Find Masters you want to follow and click ‘Copy’. Their positions will be copied automatically. The deposit percentage setting will help you manage your portfolio

Profit!

Profit, earn and withdraw

Insights

Our Core Services

  • FINANCIAL MARKET

Aside our major investment portfolio being in cryptocurrency and forex, Our Parent company partners in a lot of foreign short term projects. Partnerships in categories of Agriculture, Oil & Gas.

Read More
  • RETIREMENT PLANNING

There is nothing better than a financially secure future. Don't spend all your money today, plan for a better tomorrow. We simply advise on how to go about your finances today and let you smile about it tomorrow.

Read More
  • RISK MANAGEMENT

Today, there are many investment companies all over the globe, and it may be tasking and confusing to make the right choice. Our risk evaluation gives you a full report and final advice on your investment plans.

Read More

About

We are secure, reliable with our advanced digital asset trading platform. We're proud to provide cutting-edge expertise in areas of Financial Administration; Risk Management with Investment and Return Provisioning. Here, our expertise and experience serve a single purpose: To help you succeed financially. With over £1Billion investment security, we never worry about those rainy days in global trades and projects as we have our investors covered.
